preToolUse.comment: Doc file warning: warn about non-standard documentation files (toolName==edit only, handled inside script)
Suggest manual compaction at logical intervals (toolName==edit, handled inside script)

preToolUse.bash: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const cmd=(JSON.parse(i.toolArgs||'{}').command||'');if(i.toolName==='bash'&&/git push/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[Hook] Reminder: review changes before push\n')}"
preToolUse.powershell: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const cmd=(JSON.parse(i.toolArgs||'{}').command||'');if(i.toolName==='bash'&&/git push/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[Hook] Reminder: review changes before push\n')}"
preToolUse.comment: Reminder before git push to review changes

postToolUse.comment: Auto-format JS/TS files after edits (auto-detects Biome or Prettier; toolName==edit, handled inside script)
TypeScript check after editing .ts/.tsx files (toolName==edit, handled inside script)
Warn about console.log statements after edits (toolName==edit, handled inside script)
Check for console.log in modified files after each tool use

sessionStart.comment: Load previous context and detect package manager on new session
